author: MikiRoma87 Miki
msg:
hey there, Tried to DM you but can't.

You also have to understand that UNOs can't be micromanaging every single license or ULO out there, we invested at least 5k$ to get one of these nodes and it's honestly disheartening having so many licenses unleased for many as it's giving no ROI.

Yes, we do most of the work for Unity, but the Team is working hard and yet still needs to work harder to trap these gaps reported and that they know are happening all around.
